brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate as the US launches airstrikes against Iran, while Australia faces rising wellbeing poverty and consumer safety concerns. Meanwhile, AI's role in politics and writing is under scrutiny, and research explores ChatGPT's impact on personal statements and narrative visualization.
news_summary: US airstrikes retaliate against Iran after American troops killed; Australia reports record life dissatisfaction and asbestos risks in play sand; Tate brothers arrested in US with new UK charges; AI chatbots targeted by political campaigns.
papers_summary: Studies examine ChatGPT's effects on rhetorical moves in personal statements and multimodal LLMs for scientific visualization literacy, alongside human-robot juggling and narrative visualization in swimming videos.

en.brief: Geopolitical tensions escalate as the US launches airstrikes against Iran, while Australia faces rising wellbeing poverty and consumer safety concerns. Meanwhile, AI's role in politics and writing is under scrutiny, and research explores ChatGPT's impact on personal statements and narrative visualization.
en.news_summary: US airstrikes retaliate against Iran after American troops killed; Australia reports record life dissatisfaction and asbestos risks in play sand; Tate brothers arrested in US with new UK charges; AI chatbots targeted by political campaigns.
en.papers_summary: Studies examine ChatGPT's effects on rhetorical moves in personal statements and multimodal LLMs for scientific visualization literacy, alongside human-robot juggling and narrative visualization in swimming videos.

zh.brief: 今日新闻涵盖中国双胞胎姐妹癌症研究、揭阳虐狗案、朝鲜K-pop渗透、欧洲空调需求、世界杯金靴之争及系外行星大气层发现。论文方面关注写作与AI应用研究。
zh.news_summary: 中国研究显示矮小双胞胎姐妹为癌症预防提供线索；揭阳虐狗案引发全球舆论；朝鲜民众通过K-pop接触外部文化；欧洲热浪推动中国空调需求；姆巴佩与梅西争夺世界杯金靴；发现宜居带系外行星存在大气层。
zh.papers_summary: 研究探讨了写作中名词短语复杂性发展、ChatGPT对个人陈述修改的影响，以及AI编码代理的安全风险。

todays_image.caption: Rothko's "No. 4" captures the same somber drift into grey as Australia’s collective mood sinks under "wellbeing poverty."
todays_image.title: No. 4
